name: threadlight-skills
description: Threadlight pilot pipeline — 10 Copilot skills that take a customer engagement from brief to deployed, production-ready Foundry agent. Covers process design (SPEC.md, demo deck, prep guide), local test (Pattern 0 quickstart), 7-phase azd deploy, pre/post-deploy gate, demo data factory, event triggers (ACA Jobs, Event Grid, cron), human-in-the-loop gates (Teams Adaptive Cards, audit trail), operator workspace UI, and the paved path to production (Citadel spoke + AGT v4 + AI Gateway / VNet checklist with live Azure probes). USE FOR: threadlight, pilot pipeline, process design, demo deck, prep guide, local test, azd deploy, safe check, demo data, event triggers, HITL, workspace UI, production readiness, paved path to production, citadel spoke, AGT, AI gateway, lab graveyard, customer architecture review, CISO sign-off, go-live readiness, seller enablement. DO NOT USE FOR: Foundry agent reference (use awesome-gbb), Zava digital-clone (use zava-constellation).
